viewed from the perspective of the condition of the patient 
when the services were ordered and what was, at that time, reasonably expected to be 
appropriate treatment for the illness or injury throughout the certification period. 

A patient's overall medical condition, without regard to whether the illness or injury is 
acute, chronic, terminal, or expected to extend over a long period of time, should be 
considered in deciding whether skilled services are needed. A patient's diagnosis
